subcodes.first_line: O My name Mihdi! There hath come once again before the Wronged One that which thou didst send, and We have made mention of every name that was contained therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی مهدی قد حضر لدی المظلوم مره اخری ما ارسله و ذکرنا کل اسم کان فیه
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action
